content.en:
Several other half-step extradimensional realms are also very aware of how serious the consequences of the fall of the Ancestor are, which is equivalent to not having the hole cards to deter several hostile forces, and they will be at a disadvantage in the future when fighting with other forces, which will lead to the decline of the Tianyang family more and more.

Unless a transcendental realm that rivals the ancestor is born in the future, how difficult it is to give birth to such a extradimensional realm!

The other two extra-dimensional realms in the family, who have practiced countless extra-dimensional eras, are just ordinary extra-dimensional realms, and sometimes talent, understanding, and luck are all indispensable, and it is difficult to replicate them!

"If the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass is not enough by then, we will have to work hard!"

Cations said helplessly.

Yes, their lives are not worth mentioning compared to the Ancestor, if they sacrifice a few half-step extradimensional realms in exchange for the Ancestor to survive, it is undoubtedly worth it.

But they haven't gotten to that "four, eight, seven" step yet, so they don't need to work hard yet.

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian looked around.

Before coming, the Tianyang family also gave him specific information, such as some basic information about this treasure land.

This treasure land is called the No. 6 treasure land of Tianyang by the Tianyang family, and it was not paid much attention to it in the past, and even a half-step super-dimensional realm was not sent, but now for the sake of the Tianchao Golden Ruins Grass, several half-step super-dimensional realms have to be sent to guard it.

The inside of this treasure land is very dangerous, the danger comes from extradimensional creatures and natural extradimensional forbidden areas, some extradimensional forbidden areas are very terrifying, once you step in, you will be killed in an instant.

Of course, there are relatively few such extradimensional forbidden areas, and the main danger here comes from those extradimensional creatures.

According to the information of the Tianyang family, there does not seem to be a half-step extra-dimensional creature in this treasure land, but there is a kind of extra-dimensional creature of an indolent turtle, whose physical defense is almost invincible, and the peak realm god can barely break the opponent's defense, and the other party also has the ability to devour, and it also contains terrifying extra-dimensional power, although it is not a real extra-dimensional power, but it is also comparable to the extra-dimensional power of high-level extra-dimensional things.

Therefore, none of the top peak realm gods can defeat the lazy turtle, and there are still a lot of lazy turtles.

The only good news is that the Lazy Tortoise is almost always in its own territory and will not actively attack them, as long as they avoid the Lazy Tortoise's territory, there is no need to fight the Lazy Tortoise.

"Copy the body first!"

Ye Tian began to condense the copy body, and soon a copy body was successfully condensed.

Then, he began to separate the two replica bodies in search of resources.

This treasure land is not a danger to him, and there is a time limit, so he has to find more resources as soon as possible.

If he wasn't afraid of being too high-profile, it would be easy to expose the secret of his easy condensation clone, and he would like to condense six or seven copy bodies at once, but in that case, the risk of exposure would be too great.

Whew!!

Ye Tian's two replica bodies moved quickly, completely unafraid of possible dangers, unless the two replica bodies encountered the extradimensional forbidden area at the same time and were killed instantly, he didn't care about the danger.

Soon.

He found some extradimensional resources and immediately collected them.

Of course, he also quickly encountered extradimensional creatures.

But after he urged the power of the extradimensional, he easily pinched these extradimensional creatures to death.

However, he still hadn't found the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass.

In this treasure land, even if there is a Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, I am afraid it is extremely rare, otherwise the Tianyang Family would not only let every peak realm god collect ten Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass.

As time passed, Ye Tian found more and more resources.

this day.

He finally spied on the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass.

Distance.

Golden grass grows on the golden earth, and these golden grasses are covered with extradimensional patterns and exude a turbid aura.

According to the information of the Tianyang Family, this is the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass.

"Thirteen Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised, he found so many Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, he completed the task directly, and he could directly take away these Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass when he went out later!

And.

He also took out the surplus Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass and traded it with other peak realm gods who couldn't make up the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass in exchange for a large amount of resources, they would definitely be willing!

"Two lazy turtles!"

Ye Tian discovered them.

These two lazy turtles are staying in a nearby cave to cultivate, they are too close to the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, they can be reached in an instant, and this is the territory of the lazy turtle, the power of the lazy turtle envelops this area, once they get close, they will inevitably be discovered... 0

Of course.

Ye Tian was not afraid of these two lazy turtles, but interestingly, he also found a peak realm god, the other party seemed to have been here for a long time, and had been hiding, as if he wanted to take away the thirteen Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, but he was afraid of the strength of the lazy turtle and did not dare to go over. []

But.

Just when Ye Tian was about to ignore the peak realm god and go directly to fetch the Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass, the peak realm god made a move.

Rumble!!!!

A puppet killed the two lazy turtles, the strength of this puppet is not strong, and it is at the level of the gods of the Liangyi Realm, far from being the opponent of the lazy turtle.

Of course, this pinnacle realm god didn't want to kill the puppets and lazy turtles, but to lure them away.

I saw that the puppet smashed the lazy turtle's nest with a fierce blow, and immediately fled.

At this moment, the lazy turtle was enraged.

The two lazy turtles immediately chased after the puppet and killed it.

The speed of the puppet is not slow, but the lazy turtle is too powerful, and the speed naturally surpasses the puppet, and it immediately catches up with the puppet.

Just as the puppet was about to be killed, the Peak Realm God activated a Secret Treasure and rushed towards the thirteen Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass at an extremely fast speed.

It's a pity that he underestimated the time when the lazy turtle was there.

I saw that the puppet was devoured by the lazy turtle in an instant, and then a terrifying suction directly reduced the speed of the peak realm god by more than ten times, and the other lazy turtle tore through the void and descended, and a paw slapped over.

The 2.0 pinnacle realm god showed fear, and urged all the means with all his might, and the attack landed on the lazy turtle's body, but he couldn't even break through the opponent's skin.

Click!

This pinnacle realm god was shattered by a lazy turtle's claw, and was killed with a single blow.

"The strength of the lazy turtle is really strong, even the blood shadow puppet is not the opponent of the lazy turtle, it is very close to the half-step transcendent realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"It's my turn!"

The leaves of the sky descended.

With a wave of his hand, the True Ming Light Domain shrouded the place, and with the blessing of the Super Dimensional Heart Domain, the power of the small Cheng level Super Dimension was suppressed, so that the strength of the two lazy turtles was suppressed a lot.

"True Ming Aurora!"

Rumble!!!

Under the blow, one of the lazy turtles was instantly beaten and its body cracked.

No matter how strong its defense is, it can't stop Ye Tian's attack.
